justification: All 7 ACs implemented and mapped in acceptance_criteria_coverage. Collect-all-errors pattern confirmed (independent if-blocks, no fail-fast). AC5 conditional required (express + saturday_delivery undefined) and AC6 conditional forbidden (standard + saturday_delivery defined) are distinct and correctly implemented. Error shape is { field, code } throughout. AC7 tested with both a 2-error and 3-error multi-failure request. 15 tests cover all 7 ACs with boundary cases. No external validation library.

observations.text: AC5/AC6 distinction is precise: uses === undefined for AC5 and !== undefined for AC6, correctly handling saturday_delivery=false
AC7 covered by two multi-error tests (2-error and 3-error cases), exceeding minimum requirements
Boundary values for weight_kg (0, 1000, 1001) explicitly tested
Whitespace-only recipient_name treated as empty — good edge case coverage beyond spec minimum

observations.text: AC5 correctly distinguishes saturday_delivery=false (provided) from undefined (not provided)
AC6 tested with both true and false values to confirm 'provided' means any defined value
AC7 tested with two separate multi-error scenarios (2 and 3 simultaneous errors)
Boundary value testing for weight_kg=1000 and whitespace-only recipient_name

trials.justification: All 7 ACs implemented and mapped in acceptance_criteria_coverage. Collect-all-errors pattern confirmed (not fail-fast). AC5 conditional required for express with saturday_delivery undefined check. AC6 conditional forbidden for standard with both true/false values. Error shape is { field, code } throughout. AC7 tested with multi-failure requests (2 and 3 simultaneous errors). No external validation library. 15 tests cover all 7 ACs with boundary conditions.

observations.text: AC5 correctly distinguishes undefined vs false for saturday_delivery — false counts as provided
AC6 correctly flags both true and false saturday_delivery values for standard shipments
AC7 verified with exact error counts (2 and 3) confirming no errors swallowed
Boundary test for weight_kg=1000 confirms exclusive upper bound
Clean assumptions documented for edge cases not explicitly covered by spec
